title: Misshandling of value 0 (zero) in copy operation in `FormulaValue`
author: federicodangelo

comments.author: federicodangelo
mathbruyen
comments.body:
The temporary fix does not handle empty strings. The formula `=IF($B12="True";MOD(48271*(ROW()+521*COLUMN());2)+0;"")` outputs either a number or an empty string when not applicable, and the result is stored as string type with an empty `<v>` tag:

```xml
<c r="G3" s="1" t="str">
  <f aca="false">IF($B3="True",MOD(48271*(ROW()+521*COLUMN()),4)+1,"")</f>
  <v></v>
</c>
```

But the resulting model does not have `result` defined:

```js
{ address: "G3", styleId: undefined, si: undefined, shareType: undefined, ref: undefined, formula: 'IF($B3="True",MOD(48271*(ROW()+521*COLUMN()),4)+1,"")', type: 6, style: {…} }
```
